meta.title: NAÉLIO FREIRES - Front-End Developer
meta.description: Front-End Developer crafting fluid interfaces with precision and motion. Available for new projects.
meta.ogDescription: Front-End Developer crafting fluid interfaces with precision and motion. Available for new projects.

hero.intro: I'm a front-end developer with 6+ years of experience. I build web and mobile apps that are fast, clean, and easy to use. I work mostly with React, React Native, TypeScript, and NestJS.

expertise.heading: Core Expertise
expertise.subheading: What I do best: clean architecture, mobile apps, and solid quality on every project.

architecture.title: Front-End Architecture
architecture.desc: React, TypeScript, and clean structure to keep apps fast and easy to grow.

mobile.title: Mobile & Offline-first
mobile.desc: React Native apps that work offline and stay in sync, even on weak networks.

quality.title: State, APIs & Quality
quality.desc: State tools (Redux, Zustand), APIs (REST, GraphQL), and testing with Jest and Cypress to ship with confidence.

bots.title: Bots & AI Agents
bots.desc: Bots and AI agents that automate tasks and help teams save time.

trajectory.heading: Career trajectory
trajectory.subheading: How I got here: from shipping real products and offline-first mobile apps to building data-rich interfaces and working with AI.
trajectory.overviewYearsLabel: years building web and mobile apps.

nexla.title: Building data-heavy interfaces with AI
bullets: Built React, Redux, and TypeScript interfaces to handle large amounts of data, keeping the app fast and smooth.
Shipped AI tools that make it easier to transform data and understand the workflow.
Worked closely with QA and engineering to ship stable releases.

koombea.title: Shipping web and mobile apps for clients
bullets: Worked on web apps with React and Next.js, and mobile apps with React Native, using GraphQL.
Helped build an internal React component library to keep the UI consistent and faster to build.
Helped with deployments, code reviews, and secure teamwork across client projects.

heavyconnect.title: Offline-first apps for field work
bullets: Built React Native apps for farming work, using MobX and Realm DB.
Handled data sync and state for weak connections, working with design on simple, practical flows.
Made the app more reliable across different phones and screen sizes for daily field use.

esportudo.title: Launched a sports app on web and mobile
bullets: Built a new React Native app and a responsive Next.js website from scratch.
Improved SEO, speed, and content personalization for sports fans.
Added categories and social sharing to keep users engaged.

work.heading: Selected Projects
work.subheading: Some of my work with AI, automations, migrations, and offline-first apps.

nexlaChatbot.title: Nexla AI Chatbot
nexlaChatbot.desc: AI chatbot to transform data, with change checks

esportudo.title: Esportudo Web & Mobile
esportudo.desc: Custom sports news on Next.js and React Native

ionicMigration.title: App Upgrade: Ionic 3 to React Native
ionicMigration.desc: Planned the migration step by step, with releases and QA

heavyconnect.title: HeavyConnect Offline-first App
heavyconnect.desc: Farming app with Realm DB and MobX sync
